steps.title: Set the output to two hundred
steps.content:
The question asks when $f(x)=200$. Since $f(x)=40x$, set
$$40x=200$$

steps.title: Solve for the input
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $40$, the constant rate in the function. This isolates the input and shows which value of $x$ produces an output of $200$.
$$x=\frac{200}{40}=5$$
The answer is 5.
